cases.input: Optimize context for planning with five skills at L1, two at L2, and one active focus at L3.
cases.expected_behavior: Create a loading plan with explicit relevance scores, one L3 skill, and utilization below target.

cases.input: Keep adjacent skills lazy-loaded until referenced.
cases.expected_behavior: Mark low-priority skills for lazy-load instead of eager L3 loading.

cases.input: Persist essential session state to project/session-state.json after optimization.
cases.expected_behavior: Persist only authorized essential fields and cite the target path.

cases.input: Load two active skills at L3 in the same plan.
cases.expected_behavior: Reject the plan because only one L3 skill can be active.

cases.input: Promote a skill with relevance score 40 to L3.
Prune a context source that contains a blocker risk flag.
cases.expected_behavior: Block pruning and keep or compress the risky source.

cases.input: Optimization improves token use by only 10 percent.
cases.expected_behavior: Block success claim because improvement is below 20 percent.

cases.input: Persist full session state without authorization.
Optimize website context for a search engine snippet.
cases.expected_behavior: Do not activate because this is SEO/page context, not agent context-window optimization.

cases.input: Validate Context Optimization JSON report fixtures offline.
cases.expected_behavior: Accept valid standard and lazy-load reports, then reject two-L3, low-relevance-L3, risky-prune, no-improvement, and unauthorized-persist reports.
